text: While the fuel service is good, the staff also cross sell coolant, oil, etc. then, when you go to fill air for the tyres, the chances are most likely that there is some puncture or other problem that the recognises and you end up getting it fixed by the nearby valcanizer.

station_address: b, wing green, W View Society Rd, Lower Parel, Friends Colony, Babhai Naka, Borivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400070
text:
Today they filled 63 liters petrol in my car when the tank was not empty.
Full tank capacity is 60l.
I questioned the person. He said I’m welcome to verify.

I am convinced I’m cheated.
Please don’t use this pump.

station_address: b, wing green, W View Society Rd, Lower Parel, Friends Colony, Babhai Naka, Borivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400070
text:
One of the most CHEAT AND FRAUD fuel pump. They sell water in the name of petrol.
I stay in Powai but avoid this pump always. Incase of emergency whenever i end up fueling my vehicle, it ends up to mechanic/ service centre the next day.
Avoid this pump if you don’t want to shell out hundreds to mechanic the next day.
